creator: anubas@hotmail.com
text:
I ran the following commands:

$ sudo pkg clean -a
$ sudo pkg update -f

...and I still get the following when trying to install extensions. Pkg is no longer trying to remove my MariaDB packages but the MySQL client package still shows up as a dependency.

<output>
$ sudo pkg install php70-json-7.0.3
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
The following 2 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        php70-json: 7.0.3
        mysql56-client: 5.6.27

The process will require 45 MiB more space.
2 MiB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: n
</output>
